title: Advanced Music Mod
description: Adds new music discs to Minecraft.
body:
![Advanced Music Mod title](https://i.imgur.com/WjEdgVZ.png)

---

The Advanced Music Mod was created by [Kyronis](https://modrinth.com/user/Kyronis). It contains 14 new music discs with music by Lucas King and Kevin MacLeod.

Each of the newly added music is copyright free. You can find each disc in familiar overworld structures like villages, temples, and more.

My mod is also available on CurseForge. [Click here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/advanced-music-mod)

[![Instant Gaming banner](https://i.imgur.com/Yvbk2dn.gif)](https://www.instant-gaming.com/?igr=simon28mc)

---

### Latest versions
| Version | Latest Version | Mod Loader       | Support |
|---------|----------------|------------------|---------|
| 1.20.x  | 2.0.2+1.20.6   | Fabric, NeoForge | Active  |
| 1.21.x  | 2.0.2+1.21     | Fabric, NeoForge | Active  |

---

### Supported languages

- English, French, German, Japanese, Portuguese, Russian, Spanish

---

### Planned functions

- more music discs
- villager trades & profession

---

### Credits
- [Lucas King](https://soundcloud.com/lucas-king-piano-music) (Composer)
- [Kevin MacLeod](https://soundcloud.com/kevin-9-1) (Composer)

---

### Dependencies
- [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) (v13.0.1 and above)
